title: The Strange Idea of Taskschd1145
body:
# The Strange Idea of Taskschd1145 ## What is this? This is a NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1, featuring various whimsical and peculiar creations that I have thought of over time. # Added items -Intaste
-Mechanical bow
-Talisman
-Taskschd1145 profile picture
-Old flamethrower from Taskschd1145
-Intaste Spitfire bullets
-Flamethrower from Taskschd1145
